/usr/bin/cc -g -Wl,--enable-auto-import "CMakeFiles/test_posix-termios.dir/tests/test_cfgetispeed.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-termios.dir/tests/test_cfgetospeed.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-termios.dir/tests/test_cfsetispeed.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-termios.dir/tests/test_cfsetospeed.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-termios.dir/tests/test_main.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-termios.dir/tests/test_tcdrain.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-termios.dir/tests/test_tcflow.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-termios.dir/tests/test_tcflush.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-termios.dir/tests/test_tcgetattr.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-termios.dir/tests/test_tcgetsid.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-termios.dir/tests/test_tcsendbreak.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-termios.dir/tests/test_tcsetattr.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-termios.dir/tests/test_termios.c.o" -o test_posix-termios.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtest_posix-termios.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0  libposix-termios.a
